_comment: Maps Story Builder scene slugs -> REAL pokeemerald-expansion text labels to overwrite. The applier trusts ONLY this file, never the AI-supplied vanilla_event field (the AI hallucinates decomp symbol names). Every anchor here was grep-verified to exist in rh-hideout/pokeemerald-expansion. Extend this map to raise story coverage. 'anchors' may list several labels (e.g. May/Brendan gender variants); the scene's dialogue is distributed across the anchors in order.
